title: PM Lane 188 - PM Intake Field Start Operator Script
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Expose a phone-friendly, browser-local field-start operator script inside the PM intake workbench so Jason can run the morning-of Temp Power field-start conversation from existing local prep state without creating a new artifact, route, storage key, hosted call, or write path.
scope: Added a `Local Field Start Operator Script` panel to the Daily Action panels on `/pm-review/import-intake`.
Derived five operator-script rows from existing field-start preflight, field-prep queue, coverage, agenda, field questions, and field observation state.
Covered field-start posture, source/access question check, queue/coverage/agenda walk, context-export reminder, and stop-line boundary.
Linked each row to the existing local review surface it references instead of adding new controls or exports.

Extended the focused read-only PM import-intake smoke to prove desktop presence, mobile `390x844` visibility, initial and populated states, five links, zero mutation calls, and no operator-script disclosure storage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to define the operator-script placement and proof criteria while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No browser approval button, approval POST wiring, approval submission, or approval-row creation.
No new export action, filename, payload version, localStorage schema, backend route, handler, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.

No field authorization, lead or crew assignment, schedule/status write, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.

validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed cleanly with the Local Field Start Operator Script, 390x844 mobile proof, five script links, no operator-script disclosure storage key, and zero mutation calls; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 188 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected LF-to-CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar Chandrasekhar recommended exposing the existing field-start preflight context as an on-page Daily Action operator script, proving the `390x844` mobile path, keeping five script rows, and adding no export, localStorage key, backend route, handler, hosted call, or write path.
